g.text: Q20: Training-programme coverage — enrolment per programme
Business question: How many monsters have a training record against each
formal TrainingProgram, and how many of those certifications are still valid?
Returns: programme label, total enrolments, still-valid certifications
Exploits mi:program on every TrainingRecord — turns the programme catalogue
into a coverage report, complementing Q5 (urgent renewals, individual grain).
